ops.title: notes.Client rewire — API contract
ops.body:
Design contract for making `notes.Client` the single domain-logic surface that `internal/cli` (and, via the in-process cobra bridge, the MCP server) drives. Produced Phase 2 of the detached-HEAD-plus-library effort (2026-07-13).

## Conventions
- Mutations `VerbNoun` (CreateTask, EditNote, SupersedeDoc, AddStep); reads bare nouns (Task, Tasks, Runbook); prefix expansion `ResolveNoun`. Receiver `c *Client`, `ctx` first.
- Methods take full `model.EntityID`; the CLI expands prefixes via `ResolveNoun` first. Sub-entity refs (criterion/step/run) are unique **prefixes** resolved inside the method against the parent it loads anyway; pure resolvers also exported (`ResolveCriterion`, `ResolveStep`, `ResolveRun`, `ResolveTargetRun`) for CLI candidate rendering.
- Errors: keep notes/errors.go vocabulary (ErrNotFound/ErrAmbiguous/ErrContended/ErrRefNotFound/ErrDetachedHead + *ConflictError). Add type aliases `AmbiguousError = store.AmbiguousError`, `Candidate = store.Candidate`. `store.DuplicateError` NEVER escapes — absorbed into a `reused` bool. New: `ErrEmptyEdit`, `ErrCycle`, `*UnmetCriteriaError{ID,Unmet}`, `*AttachmentExistsError{Name}`, `*MissingContentError{Attachment}`, `*AmbiguousKindsError{Prefix,Matches}`+`KindMatch`. NO `UsageError` in notes (CLI presentation). CLI `exit.go classify` must map `*notes.ConflictError`→exit 4 and wrap `*notes.UnmetCriteriaError`→UsageError(exit 2).
- notes imports no cobra/pflag, writes no stream, formats no user text beyond Error(). Presentation derives from returned snapshots + explicit signals: `reused`, `Degraded`, `BranchSet`, `guarded`, `Present`.
- Ordering guarantees so CLI drops sorters: task lists in sortTasks order (priority asc, created asc, id asc); Notes/Docs/Logs UpdatedAt-desc; Sprints/Projects/Runbooks store order.
- Create-pack op order must stay byte-identical to today's CLI (create→SetSprint/SetProject→AddCriterion…→AddDep…→AddAttachment…) — entity id + dedupe depend on it. `VerifyNote` stays a SEPARATE Append (folding into create pack changes the id).

## Shared types (scaffolding, written first)
- `Client{ s *store.Store; dir string }`; Open records dir (ClaimTaskSync needs it for ccsync.Sync).
- Creates return `(T, reused bool, error)`. Two carry extra signals: `TaskCreated{Task, Reused, Degraded}` (Degraded=detached-HEAD → landed on backlog), `StartResult{Task, Branch, BranchSet}` (BranchSet=false=detached degrade, claimed without SetBranch).
- `currentBranchOrBacklog(ctx)(model.Branch,bool,error)`: uses `c.s.Git.CurrentBranch` (jj-aware); ErrDetachedHead → ("",true,nil). notes-side twin of CLI resolveBranchOrBacklog minus CheckRefFormat (explicit branch reaches notes pre-validated). Empty branch param + no explicit Backlog = "resolve, degrade on detached". Replaces old HeadBranch in CreateTask/StartTask (Phase-1 convention, NOT the old hard error).
- `BranchScope` enum: ScopeAllBranches(0)/ScopeCurrentBranch/ScopeBacklog/ScopeNamed. `TaskFilter{Scope,Branch,Statuses,Labels,Type,Assignee,AssigneeSet,ArchiveCutoff}` (zero = match all). `DefaultArchiveAge = 720h`.
- Edit masks use pointer-optional fields (sanctioned tri-state: unset/set/cleared; ptr-to-zero clears); empty mask → ErrEmptyEdit.
- `AnchorSpec{Commits,Paths,Dirs,Branches}` (commit values resolved to full sha; RemoveAnchors used VERBATIM). `AnchorFilter{Commit,Path,Dir,Branch}`. `SearchFilter{Labels,Author,Anchors,Limit}`.
- Verdict type + consts (EXPIRED/UNVERIFIED/DRIFTED/STALE/DANGLING) = CLI note_review consts (CLI aliases these). `NoteReview{Note,Verdict}`, `DocReview{Doc,Verdict}`.
- `AttachmentInfo{model.Attachment; Present bool}`. Config: `LeaseTTL(ctx)`, `NoteStaleAfter(ctx)`.

## Method inventory (build contract) — full signatures in the Phase-2 design subagent transcript
- Task (notes/task.go): CreateTask→TaskCreated; Tasks(f TaskFilter); ReadyTasks; StaleTasks; ArchivedTasks; ClaimTask(+claimable guard); StealTask; ClaimTaskSync; StartTask(id,branch)→StartResult; RenewTask; DoneTask(id,force); CancelTask; EditTask(TaskEdit); CommentTask; AddDep(+cycle→ErrCycle)/RemoveDep; AddCriterion/RemoveCriterion/SetCriterionStatus/SetCriterionScript; ValidateTask(id,criteria,timeout,onVerdict); ResolveCriterion.
- Note+Doc (notes/document.go, shared generic core): CreateNote/CreateDoc (born-verified via separate VerifyNote append, re-verify survivor on dedupe); EditNote/EditDoc; RemoveNote/RemoveDoc; Notes/Docs(DocumentFilter); SearchNotes/SearchDocs; VerifyNote/VerifyDoc; Supersede*/Unsupersede*; Expire*/Unexpire*; ReviewNotes/ReviewDocs; NoteVerdict/DocVerdict; NoteSuperseders/DocSuperseders.
- Log (notes/log.go): CreateLog; AppendLog(LogAppend); EditLog; RemoveLog; Logs(LogFilter); SearchLogs.
- Runbook (notes/runbook.go): CreateRunbook; Runbooks(includeArchived); Activate/ArchiveRunbook; EditRunbook; CommentRunbook; AddStep/RemoveStep/EditStep/MoveStep (Placement); StartRun; SetRunStep; FinishRun; ResolveStep/ResolveRun/ResolveTargetRun/DerivedRunStatus. All writes ensureRunbookActive except activate.
- Sprint+Project (notes/planning.go): CreateSprint/CreateProject (gain reused); Sprints(SprintFilter)/Projects(ProjectFilter); ActivateSprint(renamed from StartSprint)/Complete/Cancel; CompleteProject/Archive/Cancel; EditSprint/EditProject; CommentSprint/CommentProject.
- Attachment (notes/attach.go): AttachFile→(att,guarded,err); ResolveAttachable; OpenAttachment; AttachmentPath; AttachmentInfos.
- Reads (notes/read.go): typed Note/Doc/Log/Runbook loads; ResolveNote/Doc/Log/Runbook; ResolveEntity (kind-agnostic). Delete old unfiltered Tasks()/Sprints()/Projects() (subsumed by filtered).

## Stays in CLI
Flag parsing/binding/mutual-exclusion; input validation + UsageError exit-2 mapping (validateTitle, parse*, CheckRefFormat on explicit --branch); all formatting (print/dto/lean/show, DTO enrichment like blocksFor reverse index, didyoumean); stderr hints (autoInstall + refspec announce, warnDuplicate off `reused`, detached degrade hints off Degraded/BranchSet, prune-guard off `guarded`, missing-content remediation); file-mode (--checkout/--apply/--abort); validate consent UX (script echo, confirm, --yes); attachment ingestion orchestration; default view policy (statuses open,in_progress; search limit 20; archive cutoff).

## Out of scope (stay on internal/store directly; follow-ons — would leak fold/trail types)
history, blame, status, relevant, papercut, init/setup, sync, reconcile, gc/compact, mount, viz.

## Sequencing — per-domain migration (build notes → rewire CLI → delete CLI dup → verify)
0. Scaffolding (serial, 1 agent): errors.go, notes.go core+helpers+config, read.go loads/resolves/ResolveEntity, anchor.go, attach.go, shared types. Full suite green; notes still zero CLI importers.
1. Task (serial exemplar): notes/task.go + rewire CLI task.go/blockers.go/validate.go; delete claimable/branchFilter/sortTasks/hasPath/claimSteal/claimSyncYield/unmetCriteriaErr/isStale/isArchived; add exit.go mappings. Full suite + exit-code sweep.
2. Parallel ×5 (disjoint files both sides): Documents(note+doc), Log, Runbook, Planning(sprint+project), Attachment.
3. Sweep: delete dead CLI helpers (resolveCommits/buildAnchors/buildWitness/verdict family/resolve{Step,Run,Criterion}/entityAttachments/checkAttachCollisions/threshold internals); godoc audit ~70 new exported symbols; grep internal/cli for stray model.Op / s.Append outside file-mode adapters.

Pitfalls: create-pack op order byte-identical; VerifyNote separate append; RemoveAnchors verbatim; UnmetCriteriaError→exit2, ErrCycle→exit1; CurrentBranch-with-degrade replaces old HeadBranch hard-error — do not revert. Regression harness = existing CLI test suite (byte-identical stdout/stderr + exit codes) must stay green each phase.
ops.when: building or extending the notes.Client Go package, or rewiring internal/cli / the MCP server onto it
